mapper.sql: WK_USER_LRN_STS AS ( SELECT WS.SBJCT_ID , L.USER_ID , L.LCTR_WKNO AS WKNO , MAX(L.PRGRT) AS LRN_PRGRT , MAX(CASE WHEN L.PRGRT >= 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CMPTN_YN_NUM FROM TB_LMS_BYWK_USER_LRN_STS L JOIN TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL WS ON WS.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID = L.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID WHERE WS.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} GROUP BY WS.SBJCT_ID, L.USER_ID, L.LCTR_WKNO )
PRGRT_TO_STS AS ( SELECT C.SBJCT_ID , C.LRN_PRD_IN_PRGRT AS ATND_MIN_PRGRT , C.LATE_RCG_PRD_IN_PRGRT AS LATE_MIN_PRGRT FROM TB_LMS_BYWKNO_ATTNDNC_CRTR C WHERE C.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} )

sql.if: AND ( LOWER(U.USERNM) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{srchKeyword})) OR U.STDNT_NO LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(#{srchKeyword}) OR LOWER(D.DEPTNM) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{srchKeyword})) )

mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT T.DGRS_YR AS searchYr , CASE WHEN T.DGRS_SMSTR_COHORT IN ('20', '21', '2') THEN '2' ELSE '1' END AS searchSmstr FROM TB_LMS_ORG_SMSTR_COHORT T WHERE T.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND NVL(T.NOW_SMSTRYN, 'N') = 'Y' ORDER BY T.DGRS_YR DESC, T.DGRS_SMSTR_COHORT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT A.SBJCT_ID AS sbjctId , A.SBJCT_YR AS sbjctYr , TRIM(A.SBJCT_SMSTR) AS sbjctSmstr , A.DEPT_ID AS deptId , D.DEPTNM AS deptnm , A.CRCLMN_NO AS crclmnNo , A.SBJCTNM AS sbjctnm , A.DVCLAS_NO AS dvclasNo , A.DVCLAS_NCKNM AS dvclasNcknm , A.CRDTS AS crdts , A.WHOL_WK_CNT AS wkCnt , B.USERNM AS usernm , A.SMSTR_CHRT_ID AS smstrChrtId , A.USEYN AS useyn , ( SELECT LISTAGG(U2.USERNM, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY SA.SBJCT_ADM_SEQNO) FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_ADM SA JOIN TB_LMS_USER U2 ON U2.USER_ID = SA.USER_ID WHERE SA.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND SA.SBJCT_ADM_TYCD = 'TUT' ) AS tutor FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_USER B ON A.PROF_ID = B.USER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT D ON A.DEPT_ID = D.DEPT_ID WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND NVL(A.DELYN, 'N') = 'N'

WITH ,
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT U.USER_ID) FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC E JOIN TB_LMS_USER U ON U.USER_ID = E.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT D ON D.DEPT_ID = U.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT W.USER_ID , SUM( CASE WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.ATND_MIN_PRGRT, 80) THEN 0 WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.LATE_MIN_PRGRT, 60) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ) AS ABSNCE_CNT FROM WK_USER_LRN_STS W LEFT JOIN PRGRT_TO_STS C ON C.SBJCT_ID = W.SBJCT_ID GROUP BY W.USER_ID ) AB ON AB.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE E.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId}

WITH , , STDNT_BASE AS ( SELECT U.USER_ID , U.USERNM , U.STDNT_NO , D.DEPTNM , NULL AS ENTRNS_YR , NULL AS GRADE , COALESCE(AB.ABSNCE_CNT, 0) AS ABSNCE_CNT , MAX(CASE WHEN W.WKNO = 1 THEN CASE WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.ATND_MIN_PRGRT,80) THEN 'O' WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.LATE_MIN_PRGRT,60) THEN '△' ELSE 'X' END END) AS WK1_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN W.WKNO = 2 THEN CASE WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.ATND_MIN_PRGRT,80) THEN 'O' WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.LATE_MIN_PRGRT,60) THEN '△' ELSE 'X' END END) AS WK2_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN W.WKNO = 3 THEN CASE WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.ATND_MIN_PRGRT,80) THEN 'O' WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.LATE_MIN_PRGRT,60) THEN '△' ELSE 'X' END END) AS WK3_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN W.WKNO = 4 THEN CASE WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.ATND_MIN_PRGRT,80) THEN 'O' WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.LATE_MIN_PRGRT,60) THEN '△' ELSE 'X' END END) AS WK4_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN W.WKNO = 5 THEN CASE WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.ATND_MIN_PRGRT,80) THEN 'O' WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.LATE_MIN_PRGRT,60) THEN '△' ELSE 'X' END END) AS WK5_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN W.WKNO = 6 THEN CASE WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.ATND_MIN_PRGRT,80) THEN 'O' WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.LATE_MIN_PRGRT,60) THEN '△' ELSE 'X' END END) AS WK6_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN W.WKNO = 7 THEN CASE WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.ATND_MIN_PRGRT,80) THEN 'O' WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.LATE_MIN_PRGRT,60) THEN '△' ELSE 'X' END END) AS WK7_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN W.WKNO = 8 THEN CASE WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.ATND_MIN_PRGRT,80) THEN 'O' WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.LATE_MIN_PRGRT,60) THEN '△' ELSE 'X' END END) AS WK8_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN W.WKNO = 9 THEN CASE WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.ATND_MIN_PRGRT,80) THEN 'O' WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.LATE_MIN_PRGRT,60) THEN '△' ELSE 'X' END END) AS WK9_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN W.WKNO = 10 THEN CASE WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.ATND_MIN_PRGRT,80) THEN 'O' WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.LATE_MIN_PRGRT,60) THEN '△' ELSE 'X' END END) AS WK10_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN W.WKNO = 11 THEN CASE WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.ATND_MIN_PRGRT,80) THEN 'O' WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.LATE_MIN_PRGRT,60) THEN '△' ELSE 'X' END END) AS WK11_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN W.WKNO = 12 THEN CASE WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.ATND_MIN_PRGRT,80) THEN 'O' WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.LATE_MIN_PRGRT,60) THEN '△' ELSE 'X' END END) AS WK12_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN W.WKNO = 13 THEN CASE WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.ATND_MIN_PRGRT,80) THEN 'O' WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.LATE_MIN_PRGRT,60) THEN '△' ELSE 'X' END END) AS WK13_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN W.WKNO = 14 THEN CASE WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.ATND_MIN_PRGRT,80) THEN 'O' WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.LATE_MIN_PRGRT,60) THEN '△' ELSE 'X' END END) AS WK14_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN W.WKNO = 15 THEN CASE WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.ATND_MIN_PRGRT,80) THEN 'O' WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.LATE_MIN_PRGRT,60) THEN '△' ELSE 'X' END END) AS WK15_STS , SUM(CASE WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.ATND_MIN_PRGRT,80) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ATND_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.LATE_MIN_PRGRT,60) AND W.LRN_PRGRT < NVL(C.ATND_MIN_PRGRT,80) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS LATE_CNT FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC E JOIN TB_LMS_USER U ON U.USER_ID = E.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT D ON D.DEPT_ID = U.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN WK_USER_LRN_STS W ON W.USER_ID = U.USER_ID LEFT JOIN PRGRT_TO_STS C ON C.SBJCT_ID = W.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT W2.USER_ID , SUM( CASE WHEN W2.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C2.ATND_MIN_PRGRT, 80) THEN 0 WHEN W2.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C2.LATE_MIN_PRGRT, 60) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ) AS ABSNCE_CNT FROM WK_USER_LRN_STS W2 LEFT JOIN PRGRT_TO_STS C2 ON C2.SBJCT_ID = W2.SBJCT_ID GROUP BY W2.USER_ID ) AB ON AB.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE E.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId}
GROUP BY U.USER_ID, U.USERNM, U.STDNT_NO, D.DEPTNM, COALESCE(AB.ABSNCE_CNT, 0) ) SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, P.* FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY S.STDNT_NO ASC) AS lineNo , COUNT(1) OVER() AS totalCnt , S.USER_ID AS userId , S.USERNM AS usernm , S.STDNT_NO AS stdntNo , S.DEPTNM AS deptnm , S.ENTRNS_YR AS entyR , S.GRADE AS scyr , S.ABSNCE_CNT AS absnCnt , S.ATND_CNT AS atndCnt , S.LATE_CNT AS lateCnt , S.WK1_STS AS wk1Sts , S.WK2_STS AS wk2Sts , S.WK3_STS AS wk3Sts , S.WK4_STS AS wk4Sts , S.WK5_STS AS wk5Sts , S.WK6_STS AS wk6Sts , S.WK7_STS AS wk7Sts , S.WK8_STS AS wk8Sts , S.WK9_STS AS wk9Sts , S.WK10_STS AS wk10Sts , S.WK11_STS AS wk11Sts , S.WK12_STS AS wk12Sts , S.WK13_STS AS wk13Sts , S.WK14_STS AS wk14Sts , S.WK15_STS AS wk15Sts FROM STDNT_BASE S ORDER BY S.STDNT_NO ASC ) P WHERE ROWNUM <= (#{firstIndex} + #{listScale}) ) WHERE rnum > #{firstIndex}

WITH ,
SELECT W.WKNO AS wkNo , COUNT(DISTINCT A.USER_ID) AS totalCnt , SUM( CASE WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.ATND_MIN_PRGRT, 80) THEN 0 WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.LATE_MIN_PRGRT, 60) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ) AS notLrnnCnt , CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT A.USER_ID) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND( SUM( CASE WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.ATND_MIN_PRGRT, 80) THEN 0 WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.LATE_MIN_PRGRT, 60) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ) / COUNT(DISTINCT A.USER_ID) * 100 , 2) END AS notLrnnRt FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC A JOIN WK_USER_LRN_STS W ON W.USER_ID = A.USER_ID AND W.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN PRGRT_TO_STS C ON C.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} GROUP BY W.WKNO ORDER BY W.WKNO ASC

WITH
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY U.STDNT_NO ASC) AS lineNo , U.USER_ID , U.USERNM , U.STDNT_NO , D.DEPTNM , NULL AS entyR , NULL AS scyr FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC A JOIN TB_LMS_USER U ON U.USER_ID = A.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT D ON D.DEPT_ID = U.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN WK_USER_LRN_STS W ON W.USER_ID = A.USER_ID AND W.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND W.WKNO = #{wkNo} WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND NVL(W.CMPTN_YN_NUM, 0) = 0
AND U.ORG_ID = #{orgId}
ORDER BY U.STDNT_NO ASC

SELECT U.USER_ID AS "userId" , U.USERNM AS "usernm" , U.STDNT_NO AS "stdntNo" , NULL AS "mobileNo" , NULL AS "email" , NVL(O.ORGNM, '-') AS "orgNm" , NULL AS "photoUrl" FROM TB_LMS_USER U LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ORG O ON O.ORG_ID = U.ORG_ID WHERE U.USER_ID = #{userId}
AND U.ORG_ID = #{orgId}

WITH DAYS AS ( SELECT LEVEL AS DAY_NO FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 31 ), STDNT_CURR AS ( SELECT TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(ACCS_DT,7,2)) AS DAY_NO , COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM TB_LMS_LCTR_ACCS_LOG WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND SUBSTR(ACCS_DT,1,6) = #{yyyymm} GROUP BY SUBSTR(ACCS_DT,7,2) ), ALL_CURR AS ( SELECT TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(ACCS_DT,7,2)) AS DAY_NO , ROUND(COUNT(*) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT USER_ID),0),1) AS AVG_CNT FROM TB_LMS_LCTR_ACCS_LOG WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND SUBSTR(ACCS_DT,1,6) = #{yyyymm} GROUP BY SUBSTR(ACCS_DT,7,2) ), PREV_CURR AS ( SELECT TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(ACCS_DT,7,2)) AS DAY_NO , COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM TB_LMS_LCTR_ACCS_LOG WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND SUBSTR(ACCS_DT,1,6) = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{yyyymm},'YYYYMM'),-1),'YYYYMM') GROUP BY SUBSTR(ACCS_DT,7,2) ) SELECT D.DAY_NO AS "day" , NVL(P.CNT, 0) AS "prevCnt" , NVL(S.CNT, 0) AS "stdntCnt" , NVL(A.AVG_CNT,0) AS "avgCnt" FROM DAYS D LEFT JOIN STDNT_CURR S ON S.DAY_NO = D.DAY_NO LEFT JOIN ALL_CURR A ON A.DAY_NO = D.DAY_NO LEFT JOIN PREV_CURR P ON P.DAY_NO = D.DAY_NO ORDER BY D.DAY_NO

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, X.* FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY L.ACTV_DTTM DESC) AS lineNo , TO_CHAR(L.ACTV_DTTM,'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI:SS') AS actDttm , L.USER_REQ_CTS AS actConts , NVL(L.CNTN_BRWSR, L.REQ_TYCD) AS deviceNm , L.CNTN_IP AS ipAddr FROM TB_LMS_LOG_USER_ACTV L JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC A ON A.USER_ID = L.USER_ID WHERE L.SBJCT_OFRNG_ID = #{sbjctId} AND L.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY L.ACTV_DTTM DESC ) X WHERE ROWNUM <= (#{firstIndex} + #{listScale}) ) WHERE rnum > #{firstIndex}

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY L.ACTV_DTTM DESC) AS lineNo , TO_CHAR(L.ACTV_DTTM,'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI:SS') AS actDttm , L.USER_REQ_CTS AS actConts , NVL(L.CNTN_BRWSR, L.REQ_TYCD) AS deviceNm , L.CNTN_IP AS ipAddr FROM TB_LMS_LOG_USER_ACTV L JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC A ON A.USER_ID = L.USER_ID WHERE L.SBJCT_OFRNG_ID = #{sbjctId} AND L.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY L.ACTV_DTTM DESC

SELECT WS.SBJCT_ID AS "sbjctId" , A.USER_ID AS "userId" , WS.LCTR_WKNO AS "wkNo" , CASE WHEN NVL(A.PRGRT,0) >= 100 THEN 'O' WHEN NVL(A.PRGRT,0) > 0 THEN '△' ELSE 'X' END AS "atndSts" , NVL(A.TOT_MNTS, 0) AS "inPrdLrnMin" , 0 AS "inPrdLrnSec" , NVL(A.OTSDPRD_LRN_MNTS, 0) AS "aftPrdLrnMin" , 0 AS "aftPrdLrnSec" , NVL(A.TOT_MNTS,0) + NVL(A.OTSDPRD_LRN_MNTS,0) AS "totalLrnMin" , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(WS.LCTR_WKNO_SYMD,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY.MM.DD') AS "lrnStDt" , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(WS.LCTR_WKNO_EYMD,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY.MM.DD') AS "lrnEndDt" , WS.LCTR_TOC_LRN_SCNDS / 60 AS "totDurMin" , NULL AS "lrnMthd" , 'N' AS "atndCertUseYn" , CASE WHEN WS.LCTR_WKNO = ( SELECT MAX(LCTR_WKNO) FROM TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND NVL(DELYN,'N')='N' ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS "lastWkYn" FROM TB_LMS_BYWK_USER_LRN_STS A JOIN TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL WS ON WS.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID = A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID WHERE WS.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND A.USER_ID = #{userId} AND WS.LCTR_WKNO = #{wkNo} AND NVL(WS.DELYN,'N') = 'N'

SELECT C.CHSI_SCHDL_ID AS "chsiSchdlId" , C.CHSI_NO AS "chsiNo" , C.CHSI_TTL AS "chsiTitle" , CT.CNTNS_TYPE_NM AS "cntntsTypeNm" , CT.CNTNS_TTL AS "cntntsTitle" , CT.CNTNS_ID AS "cntntsId" , TO_CHAR(C.LRN_ST_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS "lrnStDt" , TO_CHAR(C.LRN_END_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS "lrnEndDt" , C.LRN_MIN AS "lrnMin" , NVL(C.ATND_TRGT_YN,'N') AS "atndTrgtYn" , CASE WHEN NVL(L.PRGRT,0) >= 100 THEN '학습완료' WHEN NVL(L.PRGRT,0) > 0 THEN '학습중' ELSE '미학습' END AS "lrnSts" FROM TB_LMS_CHSI_SCHDL C JOIN TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL S ON S.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID = C.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID JOIN TB_LMS_CNTNS CT ON CT.CNTNS_ID = C.CNTNS_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_USER_LRN_STS L ON L.CHSI_SCHDL_ID = C.CHSI_SCHDL_ID AND L.USER_ID = #{userId} WHERE S.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND S.LCTR_WKNO = #{wkNo} AND NVL(S.DELYN,'N') = 'N' ORDER BY C.CHSI_NO ASC

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY L.LOG_DTTM ASC) AS "lineNo" , TO_CHAR(L.LOG_DTTM,'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "logDttm" , L.PLAY_POS AS "playPos" , L.OS_NM AS "osNm" , L.ACT_INFO AS "actInfo" , L.IP_ADDR AS "ipAddr" FROM TB_LMS_LRN_LOG L WHERE L.CHSI_SCHDL_ID = #{chsiSchdlId} AND L.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY L.LOG_DTTM ASC

choose.when: SELECT B.EXAM_BSC_ID AS "cntntsId" , B.EXAM_TTL AS "cntntsTitle" , '퀴즈' AS "cntntsTypeNm" , TO_CHAR(B.EXAM_ST_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS "lrnStDt" , TO_CHAR(B.EXAM_END_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS "lrnEndDt" , CASE WHEN T.TKEXAM_CMPTNYN='Y' THEN '제출완료' WHEN SYSDATE > B.EXAM_END_DT THEN '학습종료' ELSE '미제출' END AS "lrnSts" , CASE WHEN NVL(B.SCORE_OPEN_YN,'N')='Y' AND R.TOT_SCR IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR(R.TOT_SCR)||'점' ELSE NULL END AS "scoreText" FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC B LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL D ON D.EXAM_BSC_ID = B.EXAM_BSC_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM T ON T.EXAM_DTL_ID = D.EXAM_DTL_ID AND T.USER_ID = #{userId} LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM_RSLT R ON R.TKEXAM_ID = T.TKEXAM_ID AND R.USER_ID = #{userId} WHERE B.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND B.EXAM_TYCD='QUIZ' AND NVL(B.DELYN,'N')='N' AND NVL(B.USEYN,'Y')='Y' ORDER BY B.EXAM_ST_DT ASC

SELECT A.ATCL_ID AS "cntntsId" , A.ATCL_TTL AS "cntntsTitle" , 'Q&A' AS "cntntsTypeNm" , TO_CHAR(A.REG_DTTM,'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS "lrnStDt" , NULL AS "lrnEndDt" , CASE WHEN A.UP_ATCL_ID IS NULL THEN '질문' ELSE '답변' END AS "lrnSts" , NULL AS "scoreText" FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL A JOIN TB_LMS_BBS B ON B.BBS_ID = A.BBS_ID WHERE A.ATCL_ID = #{cntntsId} AND A.USER_ID = #{userId} AND NVL(B.DELYN,'N')='N' AND NVL(A.DELYN,'N')='N' ORDER BY A.REG_DTTM ASC

SELECT S.SRVY_ID AS "cntntsId" , S.SRVY_TTL AS "cntntsTitle" , '설문' AS "cntntsTypeNm" , TO_CHAR(S.SRVY_ST_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS "lrnStDt" , TO_CHAR(S.SRVY_END_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS "lrnEndDt" , CASE WHEN P.USER_ID IS NOT NULL THEN '제출완료' WHEN SYSDATE > S.SRVY_END_DT THEN '학습종료' ELSE '미제출' END AS "lrnSts" , NULL AS "scoreText" FROM TB_LMS_SRVY S LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_PTCP P ON P.SRVY_ID = S.SRVY_ID AND P.USER_ID = #{userId} WHERE S.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND NVL(S.DELYN,'N')='N' AND NVL(S.USEYN,'Y')='Y' ORDER BY S.SRVY_ST_DT ASC

SELECT D.DSCS_ID AS "cntntsId" , D.DSCS_TTL AS "cntntsTitle" , '토론' AS "cntntsTypeNm" , TO_CHAR(D.DSCS_ST_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS "lrnStDt" , TO_CHAR(D.DSCS_END_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS "lrnEndDt" , CASE WHEN A.USER_ID IS NOT NULL THEN '제출완료' WHEN SYSDATE > D.DSCS_END_DT THEN '학습종료' ELSE '미제출' END AS "lrnSts" , NULL AS "scoreText" FROM TB_LMS_DSCS D LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL A ON A.DSCS_ID = D.DSCS_ID AND A.USER_ID = #{userId} AND A.ATCL_LV = 1 AND NVL(A.DELYN,'N')='N' WHERE D.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND NVL(D.DELYN,'N')='N' ORDER BY D.DSCS_ST_DT ASC
choose.otherwise: SELECT A.ASMT_ID AS "cntntsId" , A.ASMT_TTL AS "cntntsTitle" , '과제' AS "cntntsTypeNm" , TO_CHAR(A.SBMSN_ST_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS "lrnStDt" , TO_CHAR(A.SBMSN_END_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS "lrnEndDt" , CASE WHEN S.SBMSN_DTTM IS NOT NULL THEN '제출완료' WHEN SYSDATE > A.SBMSN_END_DT THEN '학습종료' ELSE '미제출' END AS "lrnSts" , CASE WHEN NVL(A.SCORE_OPEN_YN,'N')='Y' AND S.SCORE IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR(S.SCORE)||'점' ELSE NULL END AS "scoreText" FROM TB_LMS_ASMT A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN S ON S.ASMT_ID = A.ASMT_ID AND S.USER_ID = #{userId} WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND NVL(A.DELYN,'N')='N' ORDER BY A.SBMSN_ST_DT ASC

choose.when: SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY T.TKEXAM_DT DESC) AS lineNo , TO_CHAR(T.TKEXAM_DT,'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS sbmsnDttm , TO_CHAR(R.TOT_SCR) AS score , TO_CHAR(R.CORR_ANSW_CNT) || '/' || TO_CHAR(R.TOT_QSTN_CNT) || ' 정답' AS resultText FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL D JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM T ON T.EXAM_DTL_ID = D.EXAM_DTL_ID AND T.USER_ID = #{userId} LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM_RSLT R ON R.TKEXAM_ID = T.TKEXAM_ID AND R.USER_ID = #{userId} WHERE D.EXAM_BSC_ID = #{cntntsId} AND T.TKEXAM_CMPTNYN = 'Y' ORDER BY T.TKEXAM_DT DESC

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.REG_DTTM DESC) AS lineNo , TO_CHAR(A.REG_DTTM,'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS sbmsnDttm , A.ATCL_TTL AS title FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL A JOIN TB_LMS_BBS B ON B.BBS_ID = A.BBS_ID WHERE B.SBJCT_ID = #{cntntsId} AND A.USER_ID = #{userId} AND NVL(B.DELYN,'N')='N' AND NVL(A.DELYN,'N')='N' ORDER BY A.REG_DTTM DESC

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY P.REG_DTTM DESC) AS lineNo , TO_CHAR(P.REG_DTTM,'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS sbmsnDttm , '설문 참여 완료' AS contents FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_PTCP P WHERE P.SRVY_ID = #{cntntsId} AND P.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY P.REG_DTTM DESC

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.REG_DTTM DESC) AS lineNo , TO_CHAR(A.REG_DTTM,'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS sbmsnDttm , SUBSTR(A.ATCL_CONTS,1,100) AS contents FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL A WHERE A.DSCS_ID = #{cntntsId} AND A.USER_ID = #{userId} AND NVL(A.DELYN,'N')='N' ORDER BY A.REG_DTTM DESC
choose.otherwise: SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY S.SBMSN_DTTM DESC, F.ATFL_SEQNO ASC) AS lineNo , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(S.SBMSN_DTTM,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS sbmsnDttm , NVL(F.FILENM,'(첨부파일 없음)') AS fileNm , CASE WHEN F.FILE_SIZE >= 1048576 THEN TO_CHAR(ROUND(F.FILE_SIZE/1048576,2)) || 'MB' WHEN F.FILE_SIZE IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR(ROUND(F.FILE_SIZE/1024,2)) || 'KB' ELSE '-' END AS fileSzText , F.ATFL_ID AS fileId FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN S LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ATFL F ON F.REF_ID = S.ASMT_SBMSN_ID AND NVL(F.DELYN,'N')='N' WHERE S.ASMT_ID = #{cntntsId} AND S.USER_ID = #{userId} AND NVL(S.DELYN,'N')='N' ORDER BY S.SBMSN_DTTM DESC, F.ATFL_SEQNO ASC
